parents.subject: LU-18687 doc: move client man *.8 pages to Documentation/man8

commit.subject: LU-18687 doc: move server man *.8 pages to Documentation/man8
commit.message:
LU-18687 doc: move server man *.8 pages to Documentation/man8

Consolidate all of the man pages into the top
level Documentation directory.

Move all of the Lustre man pages (from 8) to Docmentation/.
Also, move some newly added *.3 pages to Documentation/man3.
This patch completes the man page migration.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I5970fddad033386a57c632f423e0496991faaa94
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58591
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
